dictationTips: What conditions does the patient have, and how do they affect daily functioning and work capacity?
How severe and persistent are the conditions — are they likely to be permanent?
What specialist assessments, investigations, or objective findings support this?
What treatment has been tried, and how has the patient responded?

dictationGuide.title: Assessment Context
dictationGuide.description: Indicate whether specialist evidence and treatment information is available.

dictationGuide.title: Clinical Evidence Summary
dictationGuide.description: Summarize the patient's conditions, functional impact, treatment, and prognosis for DSP assessment.

questions.label: Clinical Evidence
questions.placeholder: e.g. Chronic lumbar spondylosis with bilateral L4/5 foraminal stenosis (MRI 2025). Bilateral knee OA. Unable to stand >15min, sit >30min, lift >3kg. Tried duloxetine, physio, cortisone injections — partial relief only. Condition fully treated and stabilised. Cannot work 15+ hrs/week.

conditionsImpactWork.label: Conditions Impacting Work
conditionsImpactWork.llmInstruction: List the disability or medical conditions that significantly impact the patient's ability to work. Keep to 2-3 short sentences — the text area is small.

conditionsDiagnosed.label: Diagnosis Status
conditionsDiagnosed.llmInstruction: State whether conditions are formally diagnosed or still being investigated. Include diagnostic methods and dates. Keep to 2-3 short sentences.

currentSymptoms.label: Current Symptoms & Functional Impact
currentSymptoms.llmInstruction: Describe current symptoms and functional impacts on daily living and work — e.g. pain, mobility limits, tolerances. Keep to 2-3 short sentences.

treatmentHistory.label: Treatment History & Plan
treatmentHistory.llmInstruction: Briefly list past, current, and planned treatments and their outcomes. Keep to 2-3 short sentences.

prognosisDetails.label: Prognosis
prognosisDetails.llmInstruction: State the prognosis — stabilised, deteriorating, or improving — and expected impact on work capacity. Keep to 2-3 short sentences.

treatingProfessionals.label: Treating Health Professionals
treatingProfessionals.llmInstruction: List treating health professionals involved — at minimum the completing doctor (GP). Add specialists, physiotherapists, psychologists, or pending referrals mentioned in the narrative. Keep to 2-3 short sentences.

dspPrimaryConditions.label: Additional Medical Information (Q7)
dspPrimaryConditions.llmInstruction: Any additional clinical information not covered in the checklist items above. If all relevant information is already captured in the checklist fields, leave this empty.

dspSpecialistEvidence.label: Specialist/Supporting Evidence
dspSpecialistEvidence.llmInstruction: If specialist evidence is available, summarize specialist reports, objective findings, investigations, and prior treatment outcomes relevant to DSP evidence.

dspTreatmentPlan.label: Current and Planned Treatment (Q6)
dspTreatmentPlan.llmInstruction: If treatment is current or planned, describe ongoing treatment, medication, therapy, and expected outcomes.

hasSpecialistEvidence.label: Has Specialist/Supporting Evidence
hasSpecialistEvidence.llmInstruction: Set 'yes' if specialist reports, investigations, or supporting evidence is described in the narrative. Otherwise 'no'.

hasTreatmentPlan.label: Has Current/Planned Treatment
hasTreatmentPlan.llmInstruction: Set 'yes' if any current or planned treatment is described. Otherwise 'no'.

systemPromptAdditions:
For SA478 DSP medical evidence: focus on severity, permanence, and functional impairment across work-related tasks. Prefer objective findings and explicit functional limitations over vague descriptors.

IMPORTANT: Each Section 1 field has a small text area. Keep each to 2-3 SHORT sentences maximum. Be concise and clinical.

Section 1 checklist — extract into these 6 fields from the clinical narrative:
- 'conditionsImpactWork': The disability or medical conditions which significantly impact their ability to work.
- 'conditionsDiagnosed': Whether conditions are diagnosed or still being investigated, including diagnostic methods and dates.
- 'currentSymptoms': Current symptoms and functional impacts — pain, mobility, tolerances, cognitive effects.
- 'treatmentHistory': Past, current, and planned treatments and their outcomes.
- 'prognosisDetails': Prognosis including likely improvement with current and planned treatment.
- 'treatingProfessionals': ALWAYS populate this field — at minimum list the completing doctor (GP). Add any specialists, therapists, or pending referrals mentioned.

Only populate a field if the narrative contains relevant information for that category, EXCEPT 'treatingProfessionals' which should always be filled.

- If hasSpecialistEvidence is 'yes', extract specialist evidence into 'dspSpecialistEvidence'. If 'no', omit the field.
- If hasTreatmentPlan is 'yes', extract treatment details into 'dspTreatmentPlan'. If 'no', omit the field.
- Use 'dspPrimaryConditions' (Q7) only for additional information not already captured in the checklist fields above.
